title: Daily Review
subtitle: Turn today's local notes into a quiet diary timeline.
folderPlaceholder: Choose the folder where today left traces
emptyStateDescription: Choose a folder, then let Talos gather the day into a diary-like timeline. The result should feel personal, not like a status report.
setupDescription: Only files modified on the selected date are read.
archiveDescription: Saved daily pages appear here by date.
readingHint: The page will appear here after you look back on the day.
